Title: ADMET properties prediction
Description: ADMET AI is a framework for fast batch prediction of ADMET properties using an ensemble of five Chemprop-RDKit models. It was trained on 41 tasks (31 classification, 10 regression) from Therapeutics Data Commons (v0.4.1). The output includes 8 physicochemical properties: MW, logP, H-bond acceptors/donors, Lipinski’s Rule of 5, QED, stereocenters, and TPSA. Each result is contextualized by its percentile rank relative to DrugBank approved drugs.
Interpretation: ADMET outcomes, including physicochemical properties and classification tasks, as well as percentile normalizations based on the DrugBank chemical space.
